summary: Zero-balance perps order entry now presents a disabled deposit-oriented CTA instead of an enabled trade action.

before_after_pairs.label: Perps order entry zero-balance CTA
before_after_pairs.note: Before the fix the zero-balance screen still showed an enabled Open Long CTA; after the fix it shows a disabled Add funds CTA.

videos.note: Videos capture the full recipe run before and after the fix.
